programme.desc: Tamee gets a taste of Italy in Downtown Los Angeles at a restaurant and bar that specializing in Northern Italian food and cocktails.

programme.title: Great American Whiskey Cookers
programme.desc: Jeff goes behind the scenes at 45th Parallel Distillery in New Richmond, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Trenny C
programme.desc: Trenny C host guests from JP Wisers, Forty Creek, and John Sleeman Sons.

programme.title: Bourbon Kingdom
programme.desc: Davd and Zach review Redwood Empire Whiskey plus a discussion of forgotten bourbons.

programme.title: The Trophy Wine Hunter

programme.title: Long Gone WIld
programme.desc: If you liked the documentary Blackfish, this film picks up where Blackfish left off.

programme.title: Sled Dogs: Feature Documentary
programme.desc: Exposes the hidden cruelty behind the sled dog racing industry and its brutal consequences.

programme.title: How Not to Die
programme.desc: How Not to Die is a transformative feature film that confronts the greatest threat to human health.

programme.title: Blue World Ep508: Shark’s “Tonic Immobility” + Diving with NASA
programme.desc: Neal Harvey, a world-renown shark handler in the Bahamas, teaches us how to put Reef Sharks into a relaxed state known as tonic immobility. Then, we head to NASA’s Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston, where astronauts train for space walking underwater.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Bears, Bows, The Colombos
programme.desc: Curtis and childhood friend Dino and his son, Nathan Colombo, take a fly-out adventure of a lifetime to the backcountry of Alaska chasing monster rainbows on the fly while avoiding a big bear.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep102: Whale Sharks + Shark Hunting
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Whale Sharks in Mexico, explores a shark hunting ritual 300 Miles off the coast of Costa Rica, and takes a Deeper Dive studying shark attacks, Whitetip Reef Sharks and Oceanic Whitetip Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: Blue World Ep508: Shark’s “Tonic Immobility” + Diving with NASA
programme.desc: Neal Harvey, a world-renown shark handler in the Bahamas, teaches us how to put Reef Sharks into a relaxed state known as tonic immobility. Then, we head to NASA’s Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston, where astronauts train for space walking underwater.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Hwuy’xwet Pune’luxutth (Opening Penelakut)
programme.desc: This beautiful documentary follows a group of First Nation’s students at Penelakut Island Elementary School as they work with Riley McIntosh to create a new mountain bike trail for the community. Throughout the film, director Jason Mannings shares the history of Penelakut Island and its people.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: On The Verge
programme.desc: In the mountains behind the coastal town of Powell River, BC, rock climbers have spent decades quietly pioneering routes on some of the largest granite walls in Canada. As the landscape comes under threat of logging, the climbing community faces an uncertain future. Lives! Logs! Legacies!

programme.title: 12 Dogs Drive
programme.desc: Facing incredible physical and emotional challenges, a musher and his dog sled team travel from Churchill Manitoba, three thousand kilometres through the wilderness to their new home in Saint John, New Brunswick Canada.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Visions
programme.desc: Starring: Nikolai Schirmer, Flo Bastien, Julien Lange, Anttu Oikonen. Directed by Joonas Mattila Supported by Black Crows, Level, Norrona, O'neil. Locations: Chamonix, Arlberg, Val d'Isere.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 1: Julien Regnier
programme.desc: In Episode 1, we meet Julien Regnier. For many years, Regnier has been a central figure in freeskiing. First, as an athlete and trick inventor, then as a connoisseur collector of skis. Today, he is a master ski shaper at Black Crows, providing the means for any trick to be performed.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 2: Yorgo Tloupas
programme.desc: In Episode 2, we meet Yorgo Tloupas, the graphic development manager and visual identity creator for Black Crows. Yorgo is a cosmopolitan artist, action-sports aficionado, cigarillo smoker, fixie pedaller, and cylinder head. He wears many hats. Above all, he is a great illuminator of oblong shapes.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 3: Minna Riihimaki
programme.desc: In Episode 3, you will encounter a Crow from the early days, Minna Riihimaki. A native of northern Europe. A passionate and lively adventurer. With contagious joy, Minna fed the Black Crows DNA. When she’s not skiing, she’s also a dentist, which is cool.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 4: Callum Pettit
programme.desc: In Episode 4, we meet Callum Pettit, a mountain calligrapher, in his Whistler hideout in the heart of British Columbia, Canada.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Here Goes
programme.desc: Before ‘Skier of the Year’ Sam Kuch drops into any line, he utters the mantra, “here goes.” What began as a superstitious habit has become the confidence booster he uses to face any task. Watch this high-caliber short film about skiing, focus, and execution.

programme.title: Live For This: Float
programme.desc: A film about snowboarders and skiers slashing snow-covered walls, chasing the feeling of weightlessness. We crave those moments when distractions fall away and we lock into mountain life. We dream of it. We study weather forecasts all season. We wake before sunrise. We hit the road in search of it.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 5: Jose Lagarellos
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we meet Jose Lagarellos. He is a passionate big mountain skier. He is also the DJ and electronic events organizer behind the Chamonix Unlimited Festival. Like us, he loves original spaces and synthetic sounds. Watch now.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 6: Bruno Compagnet Camille Jaccoux
programme.desc: In Episode 6, we meet Camille Jaccoux and Bruno Compagnet, the founders of Black Crows. In 2000, two pro skiers brought a new ski to life. Their sole aim was to make a ski that could adapt to the needs of big mountain skiing. Today, their products are used on every mountain range around the globe.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 7: Hervé Picamelot
programme.desc: For Hervé Picamelot, winter is first and foremost about the road. Each weekend, he leaves his native village in Burgundy and his family’s ancient vines for his second home, Chamonix. A radical life choice, between two vastly different universes and their celestial aromas: skiing and wine.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 8: Christina Lustenberger
programme.desc: In Episode 8, we meet Christina Lustenberger. This ex-alpine racer, turned ACMG ski guide possesses all the attributes of a prominent mountain skier: passion, drive and constant wonder. If you enjoy skiing adventures, this episode is not to be missed.

programme.title: Drawn From Here
programme.desc: Drawn From Here is an exploration of professional skier Eric Pollard's processes as an athlete, product designer, and artist. The film follows the influences he draws from and chronicles a pivotal injury Pollard endured during the winter of 2013. Named Powder Magazine's "Movie of the Year.”

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Visions
programme.desc: Starring: Nikolai Schirmer, Flo Bastien, Julien Lange, Anttu Oikonen. Directed by Joonas Mattila Supported by Black Crows, Level, Norrona, O'neil. Locations: Chamonix, Arlberg, Val d'Isere.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: WOLF
programme.desc:
Everything is back to normal... But why do we feel that we've lost something? WOLF is a feeling, about mountains and skiing.
WOLF is the new movie by Sam Favret. Sequel to the successful FLOW, made during the pandemic in Chamonix. WOLF is quite the opposite, and it makes us think about what was good last winter.
Skier: Sam Favret (IG samfavret) Directed by: Maxime Moulin (IG maximemoulin) Drone by: Hensli Sage Sound Design: Mix Mouse Voice over: Bird - Michael Shaffer Screenplay: Jerome Llado Photographer: Fabian Bodet Producer: Sam Favret
Produced by: Clustr.Films lin (IG clustrfilms)
Supported by: blackcrows DB Bollé
Special thanks : Samaya Nikolai Schirmer Sebastien Overney Simon Morice Yannick Boissenot Flo Bastien
Additional cinematography Joonas Mattila

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. Six top-level Longines Ranking CSI5* classes will take place in the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid and riders will be able to change the total points in the standings.Watch the second leg of the 2021 LGCT competition.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. The stakes are high in the Club de Campo de Madrid and the obstacles in the course get in the way of the riders to become the best team show jumping riders. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Polo Club de Chantilly vs Polo Club Düsseldorf
programme.desc: Welcome to the Polo Rider Cup. The ultimate polo club competition has arrived to the Polo Club of Chantilly facilities. This time, it is the turn of the hosts, Polo Club de Chantilly, to face the Polo Club Düsseldorf. Who will be victorious at the start of the competition?

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to episode 3 of The Polo Show. This time we travel to the home of polo for a special look at the iconic English season. Set within the land of the rolling green fields with sports running through its heart amongst castles and history there is no better place for the home of polo to be.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: This is episode 4 of The Polo Show. We take a look back at the highlights from some of the most prestigious polo tournaments that dominated the European circuit this summer. We will enjoy of olympic history in Berlin with the German Open, horseriding in the beautiful beach or enjoying the French Riviera at the exclusive Saint-Tropez Polo Club in this episode. Come for a ride with us!

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 4 - Arville
programme.desc: The FEI Eventing Nations Cup is back with leg 4 in Belgium! Teams reunite in Arville to compete in eventing and become the best nation in the equestrian sport. Last time, France moved to the top in Le Pin au Haras, and competition is proving to be complicated. Are you ready for the challenge?Watch the best moments of the fourth leg in Arville.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 5 - Boekelo
programme.desc: Boekelo, in The Netherlands, is the last stop of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021. Team Sweden wants to repeat their victory from 2019 and as defending champions they will deliver a top sport performance. However, Great Britain is on the lead of this leg with 80.8 points thanks to the stellar performance of Fox-Pitt and Nicola Wilson. Will this be enough to earn the title? Find out now in the final leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021.

programme.title: Jumping International La Baule - GP La Baule
programme.desc: The competition that closes the madness that has happened at the Longines Jumping International in La Baule is definitely the Grand Prix. For a grand total of 200,000 euros, riders face a first round and a jump-off with a height of 1.60m. There is no mistake that, at a ranking of CSIO 5*, this is one of the toughest competitions in France only possible for the top equestrian athletes.Watch the highlights for La Baule Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Since its establishment in 1919, Bentley consistently drew attention thanks to their ongoing success in motor sports. The limited edition Continental GT3-R was one of the iconic manufacturer's sportiest cars ever.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: After its introduction the Audi RS6 was the benchmark when it came to extreme estate cars. Its performance was already very impressive, but according to the Audi tuners that still wasn't enough.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its Macan Turbo, Porsche sets the benchmark in the SUV segment. The optional performance package increases the output from 400 to 440 HP. A serious competitor bears the Maserati brand. With the Levante, die Italian carmaker wants to stir up the competitive market for sporty SUVs.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche GT3 RS bears a very special wing on its back. Also: the Mercedes-AMG GT S provides understatement and power at the same time. And: the even more uncompromising Radical RX C Turbo.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Mercedes‘ S-Class Coupe is a real masterpiece. We explored what the S 63 AMG Coupe has to offer in comparison to the Bentley Continental and the Rolls Royce Wraith.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Swiss tuning company O.CT turned the Lamborghini Huracan into an even more furious beast. Also: the Cadillac CTS-V looks like a regular limousine, but at a second glance it reveals its monstrous power.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E06 - Princess Diana's Legacy
programme.desc: Reflecting on Diana's legacy, this show delves into what Princess Diana left behind after her sudden passing - the impression she left on her children, the royal family, and the people who loved her. The young princes drew admiration with their demeanor at her funeral, but many questioned how their bond with Prince Charles would be moving forward.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E43 - Diana A Day In The Life
programme.desc: When Diana got engaged, she was constantly in the media's eyes. Throughout her life, she focused on her sons and committed herself to charity work, like speaking out against land mines. Diana used her fame to bring attention to this and other important issues. This well-researched show takes a closer look at one of the 20th century's most amazing people. With never-before-seen footage, it shows her path from a shy teen to becoming the beloved Diana, Princess of Wales, including touching moments from her last days.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E08 - Princess Diana The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: This show offers a captivating look into the extraordinary life of one of the 20th century's most fascinating women, seen through an American lens. It features clips from the auction where her dresses were sold.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis, without mercy, throws Malena out of the Corona house; she pleadingly refuses to return to Pablo. Blinded by jealousy, Guillermo seeks to subdue "his wife", but Lorena arms herself with a knife ready for anything. Gertrudis and Claudio celebrate their triumph, when there is a knock at the door and we see that it is Alberto.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis reminds Claudio of the convenience of keeping their relationship hidden to avoid raising suspicions while living the freedom of their love. Guillermo once again issues a death sentence on Alberto, should Lorena consider leaving him for Alberto. Alberto shows up at Lorena's house under the pretext of checking on Ignacio; she is terrified recalling Guillermo's threat, telling him that it's not a good idea for him to be there, but a lovestruck Alberto responds that he cannot, does not want to, nor plans to leave her life.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Pastora asked Israel if he loves her or her twin, since he was in love with Illis in the past; confused, Israel withdraws.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Rosa takes care of Illis but Pastora makes her leave the room; the maid decides to watch Pastora's actions from afar.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: A determined Adriana threatens to scream if Carlos Raul doesn't let go; he seals her lips with an unexpected kiss.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: César Román and Carlos share a few drinks when the doctor confesses that he broke up with Ninoska because he is in love with Adriana; César is dismayed by the news.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila wants to know what Mother Isabel is doing at Elda's house and is told that she is helping the orphanage. Camila and Yeli are on the sidewalk where Camila's mother abandoned her when she was 5 years old, scared and crying.

programme.title: EN PRIMERA PLANA
programme.desc: Programa que conecta al público con temas de actualidad global , ofreciendo una visión informada de la "Aldea Global."

programme.title: CONECTADOS
programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel plantea de forma desinteresada ayudar a Camila a encontrar a su mamá, pero ella expresa que será un trato en que ambos ganarán. Fausto sorprende a Julia con Gregorio en el apartamento de Amelia. Max, desahoga su dolor con Astrid, a quien Camila pidió que lo ayudara a olvidarla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fuerte tensión cuando Max encuentra a Camila en la mansión López Méndez. Fausto y Patricia, duros y crueles, agreden a Julia, pero saben que el peor castigo vendrá de manos de su propio padre, Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel pretende que Camila le entregue el cuaderno para conocer bien los detalles de la venganza. Luego, la sorprende al pedirle que se case con él a cambio de ayudarla pues si no hay boda, no hay trato ni sociedad.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila y Max se ofenden con ironías y frases hirientes. Las cuatro mujeres involucradas en la traición vuelven a reunirse para aliarse y anular a Camila, pero la Madre Isabel se impone. Tanto el Padre Tiziano como Luciano advierten sobre el peligro del matrimonio entre Camila y Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel acepta que Camila no se va a casar con el por amor y hacen pactos. En Mascarada, Ezequiel anuncia el compromiso ante sus hijos y todo el personal; hay diversas reacciones.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Familiares y amigos presentes en la celebración. Impacta Camila, preciosa y deslumbrante y Ezequiel la presenta como la futura señora López Méndez, pero ésta no puede responder ante sorpresivos disparos que hieren a Ezequiel. Marcelina culpable del hecho, aclara que los disparos no eran para Ezequiel, sino para matar a Camila.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Tirabeque
programme.desc: Sebas es redactor de un periódico digital que nadie lee, está en trámites de divorcio y tiene problemas con el alcohol. Toda su vida se desmorona hasta que le encargan un reportaje sobre los tirabeques. Lo que en un inicio parecía un trabajo tranquilo se convertirá en una investigación de consecuencias impredecibles.

programme.title: El Peluquero Romántico
programme.desc: La vida del barbero de barrio Víctor transcurre bastante tranquila. Mantiene una estricta rutina diaria tanto en el trabajo como en casa, donde pasa las noches junto a su madre escuchando boleros o viendo películas de la Época de Oro del Cine Mexicano en la televisión. Su rutina se ve alterada cuando su madre muere repentinamente. Su coqueteo con una joven camarera y su reencuentro con una antigua novia no pueden llenar el vacío dejado por su madre. Sin embargo, eso cambia cuando un día un hombre que dice ser su padre entra repentinamente a la tienda. El encuentro lo llevará a un viaje inesperado y que le cambiará la vida a Río de Janeiro.

programme.title: El Tirabeque
programme.desc: Sebas es redactor de un periódico digital que nadie lee, está en trámites de divorcio y tiene problemas con el alcohol. Toda su vida se desmorona hasta que le encargan un reportaje sobre los tirabeques. Lo que en un inicio parecía un trabajo tranquilo se convertirá en una investigación de consecuencias impredecibles.

programme.title: El Peluquero Romántico
programme.desc: La vida del barbero de barrio Víctor transcurre bastante tranquila. Mantiene una estricta rutina diaria tanto en el trabajo como en casa, donde pasa las noches junto a su madre escuchando boleros o viendo películas de la Época de Oro del Cine Mexicano en la televisión. Su rutina se ve alterada cuando su madre muere repentinamente. Su coqueteo con una joven camarera y su reencuentro con una antigua novia no pueden llenar el vacío dejado por su madre. Sin embargo, eso cambia cuando un día un hombre que dice ser su padre entra repentinamente a la tienda. El encuentro lo llevará a un viaje inesperado y que le cambiará la vida a Río de Janeiro.

programme.title: Asesinos Sin Ley
programme.desc: Mickey y Jenny son imigrantes indocumentados, un dia el patrón de Jenny trata de abusar de ella, Mickey lo sorprende y lo mata haceindo justicia por su propia mano así se desatan una cacería de criminales abusadores, todo lo sueben a las redes convirtiéndose en los anti-héroes más populares por hacer justicia a los desamparados.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
